# N2 resolves-nowhere source

A bare basename absent EVERYWHERE: no `nested/NOPE-ROOT.md`, no
`repos/projA/design/NOPE-ROOT.md`. Resolves nowhere → skip (NOT flag). Proves
the escape branch is not tripped on a resolves-nowhere bare name. A DISTINCT
absent basename (NOT `CLAUDE.md`) so N1-present and N2-absent coexist in one
scanned root (X6).

see `NOPE-ROOT.md` §X
